creator: avg@icyb.net.ua
text:
This is a newer version of x11/rsibreak, which is made for KDE4 environment.
Not sure if I did everything correctly, especially in PORTDOCS/DOCSDIR and
WITHOUT_NLS departments.
Also, I could have been overzealous with putting things into QT_COMPONENTS
and USE_KDE4 lists.  But at least it seems that I haven't missed anything.

Also, perhaps a repocopy first would be a good idea in this case?
And finally, I don't really insist on being a maintainer for this new port
if Alex would like to have it.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99
